headline: The Iran War Is Reshaping Energy Markets and These Stocks Win Big
summary: The death of Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei on February 28, 2026 has fundamentally altered the risk calculus across global energy markets. With the Strait of Hormuz, through which roughly 20% of global oil trade flows, now under acute threat, prediction markets on Polymarket are pricing in an 85.2% probability that Iran closes the ... The Iran War Is Reshaping Energy Markets and These Stocks Win Big

headline: Shares of oil-related companies are trading higher amid the continuing Middle East conflict and expectations for a prolonged closure of the Strait of Hormuz shipping chokepoint by Iran. Also, reports suggest Iran attacked a US-owned tanker near Kuwait.
summary: Shares of oil-related companies are trading higher amid the continuing Middle East conflict and expectations for a prolonged closure of the Strait of Hormuz shipping chokepoint by Iran. Also, reports suggest Iran attacked a US-owned tanker near Kuwait.

headline: Trump says no deal with Iran to end war without 'unconditional surrender'
summary: The futures price of the global benchmark Brent crude oil rose, breaking $90 per barrel, after Trump posted his demand to Iran to end the war.

raw.headline: Trump says no deal with Iran to end war without 'unconditional surrender'
raw.summary: The futures price of the global benchmark Brent crude oil rose, breaking $90 per barrel, after Trump posted his demand to Iran to end the war.

headline: 10-year Treasury yield rises as inflation fear from higher oil prices outweighs jobs decline
summary: U.S. Treasury yields pushed higher Friday as investors looked at the likely inflation effect of higher crude oil prices resulting from war in the Middle East.

raw.headline: 10-year Treasury yield rises as inflation fear from higher oil prices outweighs jobs decline
raw.summary: U.S. Treasury yields pushed higher Friday as investors looked at the likely inflation effect of higher crude oil prices resulting from war in the Middle East.

headline: U.S. crude oil tops $90 per barrel after Trump demands unconditional surrender from Iran
summary: The oil market is worried that Gulf countries will have to shut production if tankers are unable to pass through the Strait of Hormuz.

raw.headline: U.S. crude oil tops $90 per barrel after Trump demands unconditional surrender from Iran
raw.summary: The oil market is worried that Gulf countries will have to shut production if tankers are unable to pass through the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: CNBC Daily Open: Middle East conflict stokes energy supply worries
summary: U.S. crude oil hit as much as $80 per barrel Thursday, as the escalating Iran war enters its seventh day and continues disrupting global fuel supplies.

raw.headline: CNBC Daily Open: Middle East conflict stokes energy supply worries
raw.summary: U.S. crude oil hit as much as $80 per barrel Thursday, as the escalating Iran war enters its seventh day and continues disrupting global fuel supplies.
